sentence: 这组数据的方差很大，说明数值比较分散。
pinyin: Zhè zǔ shùjù de fāngchā hěn dà, shuōmíng shùzhí bǐjiào fēnsàn.
english: The variance of this data set is large, showing that the values are quite spread out.

sentence: 历史上真正的清官并不多见。
pinyin: Lìshǐ shàng zhēnzhèng de qīngguān bìng bù duōjiàn.
english: Truly honest and upright officials are not common throughout history.
Constitutional law falls within the scope of public law.

meaning: running of armed forces; military management; to govern armed forces;
sentence: 这位将领治军严格，士兵们都很守纪律。
pinyin: Zhè wèi jiānglǐng zhì jūn yángé, shìbīngmen dōu hěn shǒu jìlǜ.
english: This general runs a strict military; the soldiers are all very disciplined.

meaning: in numerical terms (typically followed by 不少[bu4 shao3] or 不多[bu4 duo1
sentence: 报名参加的人为数不少。
pinyin: Bàomíng cānjiā de rén wéishù bù shǎo.
english: Quite a few people signed up to participate.
